responses.finding: Template rule type vocabulary mismatch with current domain/compile pipeline
responses.detail: Normalized starter template rule type values to domain-compatible names and hardened TemplateLoader with explicit enum parsing + legacy synonym mapping for both node and rule types.

responses.finding: No executable validation that all new templates instantiate through TemplateLoader
responses.detail: Added and executed smoke test that loads all five templates through TemplateLoader and asserts project/world/nodes/rules are created.

summary: Both review findings were addressed: template type compatibility is now enforced and validated at loader level, and an executable starter-template smoke test now proves load/instantiate behavior for all 5 templates.
